signal_sharpening_heuristics.name: Confidence Sensitivity Analysis
signal_sharpening_heuristics.description: The ability of the model to distinguish between its own correct and incorrect responses across varying difficulty levels (d').
signal_sharpening_heuristics.goal: Minimize the gap between meta-d' and d'.

signal_sharpening_heuristics.name: The Calibration Trap
signal_sharpening_heuristics.description: Designing tasks where simple pattern matching leads to a 'right' answer but high confidence on 'wrong' answers (e.g., misleading logical syllogisms).

benchmark_recommendations: Tasks must require a Forced Choice followed by a Confidence Rating.
Targeted faculties: Error self-detection, confidence-weighted decision making.
Avoid: Direct accuracy-only metrics which fail to capture the 'jaggedness' of machine intelligence.
